reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain spec-bundle overread, runtime-enforcement overread, structural-rosetta recovery overread, operational-closure overread, determinism-cleanliness overread, method-drift denial, or exploration-surface promotion rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
